system.description: Special crystal lenses transmit their sight through the Ghost Field to mirrors in a central location. From one place, a guardian can monitor views all over the defended site.
system.additional_info:
Is this new industrial alchemical technology, or an ancient enchanted construction? Does the current owner know how to get the most functionality out of it? Who maintains the system?

Dangers

The lenses are hidden in mirror frames, statues, and other decor. They are difficult to spot.

The lenses can see into the Ghost Field as well, observing ghosts or occult work, and life force.

Remedies

The guardians watching the mirrors are somewhat lax.

Over time, many lenses have not been replaced or repaired. Views are limited.
